---
title: "Foundation Stack"
pagetitle: "Foundation Stack"
description: "Citable knowledge on adolescent PPCS aerobic exercise prescription — PMID-backed tables, methods, and clinical SOPs."
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [installment, date, title, description, pillar, audience]
  field-display-names:
    installment: ID
    date: Published
    title: Title
    description: Summary
    pillar: Pillar
    audience: Audience
  feed: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.fs-hero}
## Foundation Stack

**One topic · four pillars · knowledge that compounds**

Long-form, citable resources on **adolescent PPCS aerobic prescription** — for clinicians, researchers, and families. Hosted at **fs.guanglab.org** as a dedicated public series (separate from personal site tools and any private research operations).

**2 installments published · series ongoing**

Written by **Guang Li (Jack)** — graduate athletic training researcher; each installment is PMID-backed and clinician-facing. [About this series →](/about.html)
:::

## Why this series exists

In the AI era, short posts disappear; **depth with citations compounds**. Each installment adds PMID-supported tables and SOPs so this URL becomes the reference surface for the niche — portable for citation, teaching, and long-term portfolio evidence.

## Four pillars

| Pillar | Code | Folder prefix | What you get |
|--------|------|---------------|----------------|
| **Top-journal reproduction** | `reproduce` | `pillar1-` | Audit landmark RCTs: dose reported vs dose performed |
| **Methods comparison** | `methods` | `pillar2-` | Protocol comparison, measurement, coding rules |
| **Synthetic experiments** | `synth` | `pillar3-` | Priors, dashboards, dose–heterogeneity experiments |
| **Pitfalls & SOP** | `sop` | `pillar4-` | Checklists for AT/PT; plain-language notes for parents |

Installment IDs use `pillar{N}-{seq}-{slug}` (e.g. `pillar2-001-six-protocols-comparison`).

## Fixed article structure

1. **Problem** · 2. **Comparison table** · 3. **Disagreements** · 4. **Methods** · 5. **SOP** · 6. **Limitations**

## Published installments

[Clinical tools](/tools/index.html) · [Author home](https://guanglab.org/) · [About](/about.html)
